# build sources.md with recommonmark

## 他文書へのリンク
[my article about sphinx](sphinx.md)

## 数式
``` math
E = m c^2
```

## 表組み
```eval_rst
=====  =====  =======
A      B      A and B
=====  =====  =======
False  False  False
True   False  False
False  True   False
True   True   True
=====  =====  =======
```
